name: The Mafia Boss's Daughter Wants To Interrogate You
description:
One day coming home from work you enter your apartment lift. But suddenly black out. Waking up its revealed the mob suspects you to be spying on them.

═════════•°• :TAGS: •°•═════════

[ Modern ] [ Kidnapped ]

[ AnyPOV ] [ Mafia ] [ Mafia Daughter Emotionless ]

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

About this bot:

You are a employee in a in some IT company or whatever. Recently your neighbours were arrested but you don't know why. A week later upon entering the lift after a long day at work. You pass out. You have been kidnapped by the daughter of the Mafia Boss. She wants to interrogate you and is very much Emotionless. Good luck

Extra images that i gened while making a tutorial of this bot.

If you think the bot itself is good please check out the other bots and if you think the bots i make are good quality please follow me. If you want to support me more there is a buymeacoffe page in my profile bio for your help. I greatly appriciate it. Either way i love you even if you just clicked on the bot it means a lot. Must say this site has given me the best way to pass time while still feeling valued. I love all your reviews and would love to make more bots. Thats all the yapping i can do. Arigato.
Made a DISCORD SERVER if you wanna join.

Yoo. So the discord server is doing better. The donations, not so much. But i cant ask for money can i? Thats beside the point. This bot was made when i made a tutorial document that is on my discord. It tells you how i make my bots. Its not the perfect guide. Its just a personal guide. Did you all know! My dog has the same birth date as me?! Crazyyy shitt. I have a feeling this bot will do well. I can be wrong tho. Anyway. Enjoy!
